calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Petitioners, Lilya Dukler and Alexander Alperin the parents of the minor present in pro per, were sworn and examined. Mr. Alexander Alperin signed the petition in open court.
The Court grants the decree changing the Minor Petitioner's name to Michael Alexander Alperin.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-21-2003 Reset To May-08-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Petitioner, Lilya Dukler appeared in pro per and was sworn and examined. No appearance by the father. Also, signature of the father is ommited from the petition. Matter continued to May 08, 2003.
